items.name: 熊川稚児鹿舞
items.description: 毎年8月に諏訪神社で行われる。子どもが扮した4人の獅子と野猿1人の計5人で構成される。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the Kumagawa children's deer dance (chigo shishimai). Town-designated by Ōkuma Town on 1972-04-01. Located in the Kumagawa district (Suwa Shrine).

items.name: 長者原じゃんがら念仏太鼓踊り
items.description: 先祖・死者供養の意味合いを持つ。北限のじゃんがら踊りとして知られる。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the Chōjabara jangara nenbutsu drum dance. Town-designated by Ōkuma Town on 1973-04-01. Located in the Ōsawa Chōjabara district.

items.name: 熊町はなどり地蔵
items.location: 熊町地区（初発神社境内 地蔵堂内）
items.description: 江戸時代前半に制作されたと考えられる寄木造の地蔵。はなどり（田起こし）を手伝ったという民話に由来。

en.description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, the Kumamachi Hanadori Jizō. Town-designated by Ōkuma Town on 1973-04-01. Located in the Kumamachi district (in the Jizō hall within the precincts of Shohatsu Shrine).

items.name: 熊町一里塚（北側）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 慶長9（1604）年頃に設置された一里塚。対で塚が残る貴重な例。

en.description_en: A monument in the historic site category, the Kumamachi milestone mound (ichirizuka) on the north side. Town-designated by Ōkuma Town on 1973-04-01. Located in the Kumamachi district.

items.name: 熊町一里塚（南側）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 慶長9（1604）年頃に設置された一里塚。対で塚が残る貴重な例。

en.description_en: A monument in the historic site category, the Kumamachi milestone mound (ichirizuka) on the south side. Town-designated by Ōkuma Town on 1973-04-01. Located in the Kumamachi district.

items.name: 五郎四郎一里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 慶長9（1604）年頃に設置された一里塚。

en.description_en: A monument in the historic site category, the Gorōshirō milestone mound (ichirizuka). Town-designated by Ōkuma Town on 1973-04-01. Located in Ōkuma Town.
